title: Governance Action Log Row
description: Append-only JSONL row format for ~/.claude/governance/governance-action-log.jsonl. Each line is an independent JSON object representing one governance mutation event. Authored by SP14 Batch A T-14.2 (2026-05-18) per Plan 81 SP13 Session 3 A31 + L-34 row shape extensions.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the mutation event.

kind.description: Governance pillar slot being registered. Bare nouns per Session 3 A31. Frictionless-skip outcome captured separately by `unregistered: true` boolean field; do NOT collapse the two axes.

proposed_by.description: Entry path that proposed the mutation. claude-inline = mutation made directly by Claude without a skill or hook in the chain. claude-skill-invocation = skill body invoked the mutation pathway. user-direct = explicit `/govern register` invocation by the operator. hook-class-a/b/c/d = pre-write-guard branch #1 detection class (A=new top-level folder, B=new vault-root file, C=new file-type in existing folder, D=capability-with-vault-write skill declares unregistered destinations). skipped = soft-mandate proposal declined by operator; pair with `unregistered: true` for drift detection by librarian writers-health-audit.

session_id.description: Claude session ID at time of mutation. Cross-references session checkpoints.

rejected_fields.description: Map of pillar.field-path → {value, reason} pairs for user-rejected propositions.

override_reasons.description: Map of pillar.field-path → free-text override reason (R-52 collision tiebreaker for shadowing entries).

unregistered.description: True when user invoked frictionless skip; write proceeded without governance registration. Librarian governance-parity-audit surfaces as drift finding.

target.description: Path or identifier of the registered surface (folder path, file-type slug, tag dimension, writer name).
